note: 무지개 궁극기 전용 풀프레임(1:1) 커튼 아트. 기존 weapon_rainbow(16:9 아치)는 도감 아이콘용으로 보존하고, 스윕 연출은 이 에셋을 균등 cover 스케일로 사용한다 (비균등 스트레치 도트 깨짐 해소).

jobs.style_clause: clean retro pixel art style, crisp hard-edged square pixels, flat colors, single abstract effect artwork on a solid magenta #FF00FF background, ABSOLUTELY no sky fill, no blue background, no character, no creature, no slime, no face, no mascot
jobs.prompt: Full-frame pixel art rainbow curtain designed to cover an entire game screen, drawn on a SOLID MAGENTA (#FF00FF) background: one giant rainbow arch whose crown touches the top edge of the image and whose two striped legs extend all the way down to the bottom-left and bottom-right corners (stripes reach the bottom edge, filling the full height), exactly six clean concentric bands in strict order red outermost, then orange, yellow, green, blue, and violet innermost (all six colors clearly visible), small puffy white pixel clouds at both feet of the arch near the bottom corners, a few sparse tiny 4-point white sparkle stars floating in the empty area under the arch, the entire area inside and around the arch is plain flat magenta background (NOT sky, NOT blue, no fill, no scenery), everything drawn with crisp 1-pixel dot detail, no ground, no landscape, no character.
